title: Vanilla(+)
description: A 1.21.1 Fabric Vanilla+ mod pack (Toast is Included)
body:
### Pretty cool Mashup of a bunch of Vanilla+ Mods I Use. 
### 
-The Spoilers show _Some_ of the mods I used to make This pack

*Uses Iris Shaders

*Basic Set of Preformance Mods (Sodium,More Culling,Lithium)

*Has the Essential Mod -For Multiplayer-

*Includes End Remastered Mod

*Toast is Included

*Has The Replay Mod

Visuals
-
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Landscape
-
This Packs Overworld Landscape uses Lithoshpere for the World Gen and Biomes O Plenty With Missing Wilds for the Biome Overhauls,having Dungeons and Taverns and Hopo Better Ruined Portals for better Structures.The Nether has Amplified Nether and Better Nether. Then Lastly For the End I Used The Better End Mod. The Main Landscape Rescorce Packs I used are Fast Better Grass, Mushroom Plus Better Moss, and Fancy Crops, I use Crumbs' Better Acacia resorce pack but i didnt add it to the pack for copyright Reasons.

Shaders
-
*Uses Iris Shaders 

For shaders I use Bliss or Photon Shaders. Im pretty sure you can use Any Shaders as long as they are compatible With Distant Horizons i dont bliss in the pack becasue its not on modrinth but if you still want bliss Shaders [Bliss Shaders (make sure to Get the version thats compatible with Distant Horizons it Should say on the Page how to do that basically you go to its source page -GitHub- then download it from there](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/shaders/bliss-shader) +(For the bliss settings) [Check out this video basically -make clouds render as fog and lower clouds max height to 160 or whatever you want-](https://youtu.be/gBMEwunuEUI?si=wt5-SNfoTom_eOyB)


</details>

Gameplay
-
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Mobs
- 

**I mostly Changed how Mobs Act** Friends and Foes, Gipples Galore, Illager Invasion, Barkling, and Guard Villagers being the only exception. For the mob behavior I have mods Like Peeping Creepers, Luna Slimes, Revamped Phantoms,Herd Panic, Superb Steeds, Boids also with Birds Addon and Village Healthcare

QoL
-
For QoL I have Basic Mods Like Jump Over fences easy Anvil, Easy Magic, Dyed, Zoomify and **Inventory Essentials**

Major Gameplay Additions
-
These are The Main Mods that change The Gameplay **Farmers Delight Refabricated**,Hordes Nights, **End Remastered**, Cook Your Food, **Scorchful**, **Serene Seasons**, **WayStones** and For a Map mod I use **Antique Atlas 4** which has compatiblity problems with biomes O' Plenty where it will show ?'s instead of terrain there isnt a way to fix it so if you dont like it then you can get rid of either biomes O' plenty or Atlas map whichever one you like less. everything else on the map works though so me personaly i dont really mind

Multiplayer
-
 Hardcore Revive And Simple Voice Chat, I dont play multiplayer much and just Started to add them so i dont know much about these mods but they Should work
 
</details>

Animation Mods
-

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Player/Mob
-
just some regular great mods to have What Are They Up To (Watut), Fresh Moves Fresh Animations

Ui
-
Flow, Better F3, Bounced i use jade and Just enough Items with most of it addon mods

Msc.
-
Some Pretty Cool Mods like Explosive Enhancement, cat_jam and A Good Place

</details>

### **Dont Worry about being cautious with updating the modpack none of the mods require a specific version**

This Modpack is mostly just so my friends can Have a Easy Download. If you notice mods that are not compatible with each other let me know in the issues Link and ill change it. These spoilers dont show all the mods in the Modpack if you want to see all the mods head over to the Dependencies under the versions Tab. Also Check out The gallery for Resource Pack Order


![Welcome to Vanilla(+)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/640a15b02230eb422ee6037d07c738a053bb2ca1.png)
